name: Makapu'u Beach
tagline: A natural amphitheater channeling perfect shore break — bodyboard legends cut their teeth here.
bestTime: Oct–Apr for best east swell; mornings for lighter wind
talkStory: Makapu'u means 'bulging eye' in Hawaiian, likely referring to the prominent headland that juts into the sea. This beach has the most powerful shore break on Oahu and causes more spinal injuries than any other — the waves jack up fast over a shallow sandy bottom and slam swimmers headfirst into the sand. Despite the danger, it is bodyboarding's spiritual home; legends like Mike Stewart and Ben Severson honed their craft here. Bring fins and a board, watch several sets from the sand to read the conditions, and never turn your back on the ocean.
